description_long: This object is a white virtual reality headset, featuring a smooth, curved front panel with a logo reading 'VIRTUAL REALITY CAPE TOWN' and a stylized robot face icon. The headset has a robust, adjustable head strap system made of flexible material, designed to fit securely around the user's head. The front panel is slightly convex, with two small circular sensor ports on either side, likely for tracking or camera functionality. The sides of the headset show additional structural elements, including a hinge or adjustment mechanism for the straps. The rear view reveals a wide, padded section for comfort against the back of the head, and the overall build appears ergonomic and lightweight. The exterior is primarily matte white plastic with black padding and strap accents, giving it a modern, high-tech appearance.
description: A white virtual reality headset with a black adjustable strap, logo on the front, and ergonomic padding for comfort. The design is sleek, modern, and built for immersive experiences.
description_view_0: Front view showing the logo, smooth white panel, and two small sensor ports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved body, strap attachment, and sensor port.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide, padded head strap and ergonomic support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible strap mechanism and overall headset curvature.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, head movement, voice command
